changes: New: Your Generation History will be Saved for the following apps: AI Diagram Generator, PowerPoint Creator, One Pager Creator. You can view, download, and manage your past generations in the History section.
New: You can now Save your Favorite Apps in the Home Page for quick access.
New: Now you can rate your Generation results with 4 options.
New: Tutorial Mode for All Apps - Get step-by-step guidance and tips while using any app for the first time.
Improved: PowerPoint Designs and Smartarts are updated
Improved: Helpful Banner Messages and Usage Data Metrics for All Apps
Fix: More Mobile Friendly Updates across all apps.
Fix: Resolved Design and Printing Issues in One Pager Creator outputs.
New App: One Pager Creator - generate polished single-page Images (cheatsheets, flyers, executive summaries, infographics) from uploaded files or topic descriptions.
Fix: PDF Parsing issue resolved.
New: Added AI Warnings Popups.
New: BPMN Diagrams Can be Viewed After Generation Before Downloading.
New: Added a 404 Error Page for invalid routes.
New: New Functional Spec Template added in FR & BR Document Builder.
Improved: thumbnail previews, character limits, improved formatting in AI BPMN Builder.

Improved: Micro-interactions added across all apps - animated entrances for upload areas, file items, chat messages, stat counters, progress bars, findings, suggestion cards, review sections, and more.
Fix: Resolved connectivity issues for some AI services.
Fix: Security Upgraded with latest dependencies and vulnerability patches.
New: Copy as Diagram feature added in AI Diagram Generator.
New: Mouse cursor effect added in Festive mode.
New: In AI BPMN Builder Form, now you can Drag Lanes and Sublanes.
Fix: Diagram Generator Capabilities Updated.
New: AI Diagram Generator now includes a visual diagram guide with previews to help users choose the right diagram type faster.
New: Added clear step-by-step guides in PowerPoint Creator, AI Diagram Generator, and Audit Checker for easier first-time use.
Improved: PowerPoint Creator and AI Diagram Generator now support PDF, PNG, JPG, and JPEG uploads.
Improved: PowerPoint Creator App now includes 4 new SmartArt layouts, improved the Presentation output, added an orange theme button.
New: Added Festive Mode Button in navigation for a fresh seasonal theme. (Testing Feature)
Improved: Updated the Logo, Colors, Font according to the BSH Design Guidelines across the application.
New: Added a filter option in search to easily find AI Apps by categories.
Fix: Lots of fixes and improvements across different apps for better performance and user experience.
Improved: Added better loading animations.
Improved: Mobile User Experience significantly improved with optimized responsive CSS across all tools.
New: Added a new Upload & Analyze feature in the Signavio BPMN Builder, complementing the existing Form Builder mode.
New App: AI Diagram Generator - analyze uploaded PDFs and generate downloadable draw.io diagram types with refined result cards.
New App: Learn Signavio - Interactive learning website with games to master BPMN modeling.
Improved: Functional Spec content and structure updated for better document quality.
New: Enhanced JSON export/import support for saving and resuming document work.
Improved: Document Builder now supports both Functional Spec and Business Requirement document creation.
New: Mode selector added to switch between Functional Spec and BR document types.
New: You can now export and import BR documents in JSON format to resume work.
Improved: Home Page UI updated for better user experience.
New App: Document Creator - launched for Functional Spec document generation. [NON-AI]
New App: PowerPoint Creator - create quick presentations using PDFs in the BSH PowerPoint template.
New: Beta Version Launch!
New: Dark Mode support added across the entire application.
New: Search functionality implemented for AI Apps on the Home page.
Improved: Changelog and Notification system updated.
New: Added new hosting environment on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.
New: Implemented user authentication.
Fix: Fixed bugs in Apps.
Improved: Workflows updated for better performance.
New App: BPMN Diagram Checker - launched with Problem/Solution findings and PDF and image support.
Improved: Results panel simplified to show direct actionable guidance.
Improved: Audit Checker fully functional with PDF validation.
Improved: Signavio BPMN Generator ready for end-to-end BPMN export.
New: Initial UIs for Audit Check and Signavio BPMN Generator shipped (non-functional beta).
